claim: Replacement of histone H2A with H2A.Z slows gene activation in yeasts by stabilizing +1 nucleosomes.
evidence_sentences: Immunoprecipitation studies of nucleosome core particles (NCPs) show that NCPs that contain both H3.3 and H2A.Z are even less stable than NCPs containing H3.3 and H2A.

conditions: in vitro nucleosome core particle analysis
